title: Level Z - Berserker
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Berserker mod.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Berserker mod.

This addon adds level requirements for all weapons in armor to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add the Berserker mod to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
